---
name: Tool Request 💡
about: Suggest a new cybersecurity tool to be added to the compendium
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: enhancement, new-tool
assignees: ''

---

**Is your tool request related to a specific category? Please describe.**
For example: I am looking for more Mobile Application Security tools (e.g., MobSF or Drozer).

**Describe the tool you'd like to see added**
A clear and concise description of the tool. Describe what the tool is (e.g., A wireless network auditor), who makes it, and why it is an industry standard.

**Provide links or references**
If possible, link to the tool's official documentation or GitHub repository so contributors know where to start researching.

**Would you like to write the documentation yourself?**
- [ ] Yes! I will submit a Pull Request.
- [ ] No, just requesting it for the community.
